optional.name: fuck-u-code
optional.install_hint: Optional quality-debt analyzer for quality-debt-overlay; install manually if you want external analyzer hints beyond built-in risk scoring.

optional.name: ivy
optional.install_hint: Optional framework-interop backend for framework-interop-overlay; install manually in Python environment (for example: pip install ivy).

optional.name: leetcuda
optional.install_hint: Optional methodology source for cuda-kernel-overlay; no runtime dependency required. Keep GPL-3.0 boundary: do not vendor upstream code.

notes: Codex compatibility rewrites are bundled in this repository; plugin metadata is advisory and no Claude CLI plugin command is executed.
